endpoints.name: Usage notification
endpoints.description: Usage notification
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List Archived Promotions
endpoints.description: Lists all archived promotions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Archive Promotion or Tax
endpoints.description: Archives a Promotion or Tax by its ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{IDCALCULATORCONFIGURATION}} with a real idcalculatorconfiguration.

endpoints.name: Get archived coupon by coupon code
endpoints.description: Retrieves a specific archived coupon by its coupon code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{COUPONCODE}} with a real couponcode.

endpoints.name: List Archived Taxes
endpoints.description: Lists all archived taxes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get All Promotions
endpoints.description:
Retrieves all promotions from an account. 

> 📘 Onboarding guide 
>
> Check the new [Promotions onboarding guide](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/promotions-overview). We created this guide to improve the onboarding experience for developers at VTEX. It assembles all documentation on our Developer Portal about the Promotions and is organized by focusing on the developer's journey.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create or Update Promotion or Tax
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a specific Promotion by its Promotion ID or a specific Tax by its Tax ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Promotion or Tax by ID
endpoints.description: Retrieves a specific promotion by its Promotion ID or a specific tax by its Tax ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{IDCALCULATORCONFIGURATION}} with a real idcalculatorconfiguration.

endpoints.name: Get all campaign audiences
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of all campaign audiences and their respective configurations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create campaign audience
endpoints.description: Creates a new campaign audience.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get campaign audience configuration
endpoints.description: Retrieves a specific campaign audience configuration by its ID. This API uses the campaign ID, not the campaign name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{CAMPAIGNID}} with a real campaignid.

endpoints.name: Get all coupons
endpoints.description:
> Check the new [Promotions onboarding guide](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/promotions-overview). We created this guide to improve the onboarding experience for developers at VTEX. It assembles all documentation on our Developer Portal about Promotions and is organized by focusing on the developer's journey.

 Retrieves all coupons from an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Update coupon
endpoints.description: Updates information of a specific coupon.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create coupon
endpoints.description: Creates a single new coupon.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get coupon usage
endpoints.description: Retrieves information about the coupon usage.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{COUPONCODE}} with a real couponcode.

endpoints.name: Get coupon by coupon code
endpoints.description: Retrieves a specific coupon by its coupon code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{COUPONCODE}} with a real couponcode.

endpoints.name: Coupon Massive Generation
endpoints.description: Generates a massive amount of coupons
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create multiple coupons
endpoints.description: Creates multiple coupons with different coupon codes. This endpoint has a throttling of 60 requests per minute.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get All Taxes
endpoints.description: Retrieves all taxes from an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Unarchive Promotion or Tax
endpoints.description: Unarchives a Promotion or Tax by its ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{IDCALCULATORCONFIGURATION}} with a real idcalculatorconfiguration.

endpoints.name: Save Price
endpoints.description:
Save price. 
> If your account is using Pricing v2, you should avoid using these routes. Please refer directly to the [Pricing v2 API](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/101975/vtex-pricing-api/6YsWxKT) 

> If you are still using Pricing v1, please [check if your store is able to migrate to take advantage of many more features](https://help.vtex.com/en/faq/how-to-migrate-a-store-to-pricing-v2)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get all paged prices
endpoints.description:
Get all paged prices. 
> If your account is using Pricing v2, you should avoid using these routes. Please refer directly to the [Pricing v2 API](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/101975/vtex-pricing-api/6YsWxKT) 

> If you are still using Pricing v1, please [check if your store is able to migrate to take advantage of many more features](https://help.vtex.com/en/faq/how-to-migrate-a-store-to-pricing-v2)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{PAGE}} with a real page. Replace {{PAGESIZE}} with a real pagesize.

endpoints.name: Get Price by context
endpoints.description:
Get price by context. 
> If your account is using Pricing v2, you should avoid using these routes. Please refer directly to the [Pricing v2 API](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/101975/vtex-pricing-api/6YsWxKT) 

> If you are still using Pricing v1, please [check if your store is able to migrate to take advantage of many more features](https://help.vtex.com/en/faq/how-to-migrate-a-store-to-pricing-v2)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Price by SKU ID
endpoints.description:
Price by SKU ID              
> If your account is using Pricing v2, you should avoid using these routes. Please refer directly to the [Pricing v2 API](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/pricing-api)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: Delete Price by SKU Id
endpoints.description:
Delete all prices from an SKU. 
> If your account is using Pricing v2, you should avoid using these routes. Please refer directly to the [Pricing v2 API](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/101975/vtex-pricing-api/6YsWxKT) 

> If you are still using Pricing v1, please [check if your store is able to migrate to take advantage of many more features](https://help.vtex.com/en/faq/how-to-migrate-a-store-to-pricing-v2)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: Get Price by SKU ID and Trade Policy
endpoints.description:
Retrieve price by SKU ID and Trade Policy. 
> If your account is using Pricing v2, you should avoid using these routes. Please refer directly to the [Pricing v2 API](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/101975/vtex-pricing-api/6YsWxKT) 

> If you are still using Pricing v1, please [check if your store is able to migrate to take advantage of many more features](https://help.vtex.com/en/faq/how-to-migrate-a-store-to-pricing-v2)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TRADEPOLICY}} with a real tradepolicy. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: Calculate discounts and taxes (Bundles)
endpoints.description: Calculate discounts and taxes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.
